candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortisation, impairment losses and write-downs
candidates.why: Appears in the production-cost section above 'Cost of revenues/COGS', but it looks like a component within the selected COGS bucket rather than a separate same-level operating line to add later. It also mixes D&A with impairment/write-downs, so adding it separately would risk double counting and scope contamination.
Standalone label appears after Gross Profit with no visible value and outside the COGS subsection; not a clear COGS-specific D&A row to add.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is '[Income Statement] Cost of revenues/COGS'. The only visible production-related D&A row sits as a component within the production/COGS area, so it appears already embedded in the selected COGS total. Conservative no-add to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Explicit D&A component of the selected parent row 'Sales and distribution costs'; appears nested within that bucket, so it should not be added separately.
Explicit D&A component of the selected parent row 'Administrative costs'; appears embedded in that selected bucket, so it should not be added separately.
Appears directly under 'Other operating costs' and looks like a component of that selected parent row, not a separate same-level SG&A D&A line.
Standalone label appears after Gross Profit with no visible value and no clear linkage to the selected SG&A buckets; insufficient evidence to add separately.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the sum of 'Sales and distribution costs', 'Administrative costs', and 'Other operating costs'. The visible D&A rows are presented as sub-components within those selected rows, so they appear already included. No separate same-level SG&A D&A summary row should be added.
